subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 17/26] server41tests: test mkdir triggers ADD notification

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite, which verifies that when a client creates a subdirectory from another client, the server sends a CB_NOTIFY with an ADD event notification. The test requests a dir delegation with ADD_ENTRY notifications and checks that the correct directory name is included in the notification.
